source_title: Agent Laboratory shows how research agents can structure literature review and experiments
claim: The arXiv paper frames Agent Laboratory as a research assistant workflow for literature review, experimentation, and report writing.
snippet: Agent Laboratory shows how research agents can structure literature review and experiments: The arXiv paper frames Agent Laboratory as a research assistant workflow for literature review, experimentation, and report writing.

source_title: Agent Laboratory repository exposes the research workflow implementation
claim: The companion repository describes an end-to-end autonomous research workflow with literature review, experiment, and report-writing stages.
snippet: Agent Laboratory repository exposes the research workflow implementation: The companion repository describes an end-to-end autonomous research workflow with literature review, experiment, and report-writing stages.

source_title: AgentBench keeps agent evaluation grounded in interactive tasks
claim: AgentBench evaluates LLM agents across interactive environments and documents common failures such as long-term reasoning and instruction following.
snippet: AgentBench keeps agent evaluation grounded in interactive tasks: AgentBench evaluates LLM agents across interactive environments and documents common failures such as long-term reasoning and instruction following.

source_title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
claim: Agent Laboratory divides the research workflow into literature review, experimentation, and report writing. Different role agents collaborate around a human-provided research idea, with human feedback available at each stage.
snippet: Agent Laboratory is an autonomous LLM-based framework for scientific research. It takes a human-provided research idea through literature review, experimentation, and report writing, while keeping human feedback in the loop.
risk_note: 实验结论需要人工阅读 PDF 后确认细节和指标。
